Results by province

Source: R/resultados.R
get_provincias.Rd

A convenience wrapper around get_resultados() that pre-sets tipo_territorio = "provincia". All other parameters are passed through unchanged. See get_resultados() for the full parameter reference and details on the returned tibble.

Usage

get_provincias(...)

getProvincias(...)

Arguments

...

Arguments passed to get_resultados(). The tipo_territorio parameter is fixed to "provincia" and cannot be overridden.

Value

A tibble as returned by get_resultados() filtered to tipo_territorio = "provincia".

Functions

  • getProvincias(): Retrocompatibility alias for get_provincias(). Maintained for backwards compatibility. Prefer get_provincias() in new code.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Provincial results for general elections in Andalucia
get_provincias(tipo_eleccion = "G", year = "2019",
              codigo_ccaa = "01", all_pages = TRUE)

# Compare PSOE votes across all provinces in 2019
library(dplyr)
get_provincias(tipo_eleccion = "G", year = "2019", all_pages = TRUE) |>
    filter(siglas == "PSOE") |>
    arrange(desc(votos))
} # }
